summary:
The provided retrieval contains no documentation supporting the concept of hinge axis transfer being compulsory in complete edentulous patients; instead, most sources refer to non-dental applications such as orthopedic procedures. Given the absence of evidence linking hinge axis transfer to standard prosthodontic practices in full edentulism, the statement is unsubstantiated by retrievable medical literature.

Consequently, the requirement for hinge axis transfer in such cases cannot be validated through supported professional literature.
